hooks.command: W=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/../diagnostics/lib/time-hook.sh; H=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/code-graph-bootstrap.sh; if [ -x "$W" ]; then bash "$W" code-graph SessionStart bash "$H"; else bash "$H"; fi
W=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/../diagnostics/lib/time-hook.sh; H=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/code-graph-healthcheck.sh; if [ -x "$W" ]; then bash "$W" code-graph SessionStart bash "$H"; else bash "$H"; fi
